reviews.comment:
Buenas instalaciones ,la cuales se ven desbordadas los días de mucho tránsito,  confitería con poco oferta de productos

(Translated by Google)
Good facilities, which become overcrowded on busy days; confectionery with a limited product selection
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyd0s3cTdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, el shop y bar es autoservicio. Baños limpios y amplios.

(Translated by Google)
Good place, the shop and bar are self-service. Clean and spacious restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyZ05XN0JnEAE

reviews.comment:
buena estación de servicios mucha gente

(Translated by Google)
Good service station, lots of people
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyci1PLUN3EAE

reviews.comment:
No puede tener solo 1 surtidor por cada ingreso desde la ruta. Se hace una cola larguísima! Por el resto, muy buena la estacion

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to have only one pump per entrance from the highway. The line gets incredibly long! Otherwise, the station is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMydDdqUkV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Nunca tuve buena atención en este lugar, siempre paro por una cuestión de necesidad.

(Translated by Google)
I never received good service at this place; I always stop there out of necessity.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyLTRHZ1JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Simpáticos y atentos con una mujer cordobesa que viaja sola.

Friendly and attentive to a woman from Cordoba traveling alone.
